headline: UBS Maintains Buy on DuPont de Nemours, Raises Price Target to $59
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   maintains DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) with a Buy and raises the price target from $56 to $59.

headline: Qnity Electronics Rides AI and Semiconductor Momentum
summary: Q targets 2026 sales growth of 4.6%-8.8% as AI-driven content gains and faster ICS growth offset memory volatility.

headline: DuPont de Nemours Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) reported first-quarter 2026 results that exceeded its prior guidance, driven by organic growth, margin expansion and improved earnings, while management also raised full-year expectations and outlined actions to return cash to shareholders. headline: A Chemical Breakthrough That Could Fix the Plastic Crisis
summary: A breakthrough in chemical recycling could turn plastic waste into high-value materials, reshaping a trillion-dollar environmental problem into a massive economic opportunity.
